twitter_thread: 25 Claude Code extensions tested, only 3 are worth using.
Coralline shaved 12 seconds off my average interview time.
MCP extensions add 300ms latency, a 35% slowdown.
Plugin approach beats Skill for Claude Code, 240KB vs 420KB.
Nanako0129's coralline is the only statusline with a 95% success rate.
Installed coralline in 7 minutes, 30 seconds without CLI.
What's the most efficient Claude Code workflow you've built? #claudecode #ai
